overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic boat driving at high speed through urban waterways. The vehicle navigates between towering glass skyscrapers and industrial docklands, passing under large bridge structures in a bright, sunny cyberpunk city.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban canal with glass towers

agents.ego_description: piloting a futuristic watercraft at high speed through the main canal, steering toward the bridge opening

entered.detail: wide urban water canal with reflective surface stretching into the distance
tall futuristic glass tower with reflective windows
tall cylindrical skyscraper with metallic accents
large overhead bridge spanning the canal with support pillars
large digital advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-speed boat ride through a futuristic urban canal. Glass skyscrapers tower on both sides under a clear blue sky. The vehicle approaches a large bridge structure ahead, with neon billboards visible on the left building. The waterway is wide and open, with no other traffic present.

events.description: enters shadowed area beneath the bridge structure
lighting shifts from bright direct sun to shadowed diffuse light under the bridge
exits the bridge structure back into open sunlight

agents.ego_description: navigating under the bridge through the shadowed passage, maintaining high speed

entered.detail: underside of the bridge with metal beams and concrete surface
thick bridge support pillars rising from the water
thick bridge support pillars rising from the water

segments.scene_description: The boat enters the shadowed area beneath a massive bridge structure. Concrete pillars line both sides of the narrow passage while the underside of the bridge deck blocks most of the sky. The lighting shifts dramatically to darker, diffuse shadows. After passing through, the vehicle emerges back into bright sunlight at the far end.

events.description: transitions from bridge passage to open industrial waterfront area

agents.ego_description: cruising through the industrial zone with slight steering adjustments, passing dock structures

entered.detail: rusted metal docks and industrial loading areas along the water edge
dilapidated industrial building with corroded metal walls
small vessels docked along the industrial pier

segments.scene_description: Exiting the bridge, the scene opens into an industrial waterfront district. The left side features rusted warehouses and metal dock structures, with a few small boats moored along the pier. The waterway remains wide and sunlit, with the vehicle maintaining high speed while navigating past the industrial embankment.

agents.ego_description: continuing through the dock area, passing close to moored industrial vessels and waterfront structures

notable_agents.action: large rusted boat moored at the dock, stationary

entered.detail: large industrial boats and barges tied to the dock
solid concrete wall along the water edge with metal railings

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a dense industrial dockland area. Large rusted vessels are moored along the left concrete embankment, with industrial warehouses lining the waterfront. The waterway narrows slightly as the boat continues forward, passing close to the stationary docked boats and metal structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-speed boat journey that transitions from a polished corporate canal into a gritty industrial dockland. It begins by gliding through a wide urban waterway flanked by towering glass skyscrapers and neon billboards under a clear blue sky. As the vehicle approaches a massive bridge, the scene shifts abruptly into deep, diffuse shadows beneath the concrete deck before emerging back into the bright sunlight. The environment then opens into an industrial waterfront characterized by rusted warehouses and moored boats along the pier. Finally, the waterway narrows as the camera pushes deeper into the docklands, passing close to large rusted vessels and metal structures lining the concrete embankment.
